<!-- indicator: fig-congheartfail-mortal-rande -->

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| label: fig-congheartfail-mortal-rande
#| fig-cap: 'Coronary Heart Disease, Age-Adjusted Hospitalization Rate per 10,000 by Race/Ethnicity, 2020-2022'
#| fig-alt: 'Data visualization showing Coronary Heart Disease, Age-Adjusted Hospitalization Rate per 10,000 by Race/Ethnicity, 2020-2022.'
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_figure_object
render_figure_object(figure_id="fig-congheartfail-mortal-rande", workbook_path=CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH).show()
```
